title: 12PCS Artificial Faux Curly Twigs Willow Branches Stems for Vase, Lifelike 77cm Decorative Dried Branch Sticks Fake Greenery Plants Flowers Arrangement for Home Wedding DIY Decor (Natrual Brown, 12)
features: ‌【Premium Quality Faux Greenery‌】: Crafted with ultra-lifelike PE+PS materials, these 77cm curly willow branches replicate natural textures perfectly - from realistic woody stems to delicate leaf veins. Ideal for home, garden, wedding, farmhouse, bedroom, living room, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas and New Year Decor.

【Year-Round Decorative Versatility‌】: Style as stunning standalone vase arrangements or combine with seasonal décor. Perfect for creating rustic farmhouse centerpieces, elegant wedding arches, or modern minimalist displays. Durable construction ensures no wilting, shedding, or color fading.

【Effortless Home Styling Solution‌】: Pre-curled stems arrive ready to use - simply trim to desired length and arrange. Bendable wire cores allow custom shaping while retaining structural integrity. Compatible with all standard vases and floral foams.

【Multi-Pack Value for Grand Displays‌】: Sufficient 12PCS premium branches enable lavish arrangements without repetitive patterns. Cost-effective solution for home decor, event planners and interior designers needing bulk artificial foliage.

‌【Weather-Resistant & Long Lifetime】: Safe for use in humid bathrooms, sunlit conservatories, or outdoor covered areas. Non-toxic materials make these branches perfect for home. Wipe-clean surface maintains pristine appearance.
description: Product Description 12PCS Artificial Faux Curly Twigs Willow Branches Stems for Vase‌ ‌—Elevate Your Space with Lifelike Elegance, Zero Maintenance Transform your home or event decor effortlessly with this set of ‌12 lifelike faux curly willow branches‌—crafted to mimic nature’s beauty while eliminating the hassles of real plants. Measuring ‌77cm (30 inches)‌, these natural brown stems blend seamlessly into any interior style, from rustic farmhouse to modern minimalist. Whether you’re refreshing your living room, planning a wedding centerpiece, or adding a touch of elegance to your workspace, these versatile branches offer endless creative possibilities. Why Choose These Artificial Willow Branches?‌ ‌ Hyper-Realistic Design‌: Each twig features delicate curls(bendable), textured bark, and subtle color variations that mirror real dried willow. No one will guess they’re faux! ‌ Durable & Fade-Resistant‌: Made from high-quality PVC materials, these branches retain their shape and color for years—no wilting, shedding, or watering required. ‌ Time-Saving & Cost-Effective‌: Forget weekly flower replacements. These low-maintenance stems stay picture-perfect with zero upkeep. Easily to Create Your Unique Style: all the branches are bendable and twistable, you can freely adjust the look according to your room style and what you loved. Endless Applications to Inspire Creativity‌ Home Decor‌ ‌Living Room‌: Place in a floor vase near a window for a cozy, organic accent. Bedroom‌: Drape fairy lights over the branches for a dreamy canopy effect. Dining Table‌: Pair with candles or seasonal pumpkins for a tablescape upgrade. Party & Events‌ ‌Centerpieces‌: Combine with roses or eucalyptus for romantic table settings. ‌Photo Backdrops‌: Build a whimsical arch or wall display for unforgettable photos. ‌Aisle Markers‌: Secure branches to chairs or posts for a rustic-chic ceremony. DIY Projects‌ Bend stems into wreaths, wall art, or holiday ornaments. Spray paint metallic or pastel for custom themes.
